---
title: "Modify Mode — All Classifiers"
format:
  revealjs:
    output-file: modify-mode-all.html
---

## Slide titles {data-modify-test="titles"}

This slide's `##` heading should be classifiable.

Body paragraph for context.

## Paragraphs

A standalone paragraph that modify mode should recognise.

Another paragraph on the same slide.

## Bullet lists

- Apple
- Banana
- Cherry

## Ordered lists

1. First
2. Second
3. Third

## Blockquotes

> A blockquote that modify mode should be able to activate.

## Inline image

![](../image.png)

## Inline video

![](../demo-text.mp4)

## Fenced divs

::: {.my-fenced}
Content inside a classed fenced div.
:::

::: {#my-id-div}
Content keyed by id.
:::

## Display equations

$$E = mc^2$$

$$a^2 + b^2 = c^2$$

## Tables

| Col A | Col B |
|-------|-------|
| 1     | 2     |
| 3     | 4     |

## Code block (highlighted)

```python
x = 1
print(x)
```

## Code chunk output

```{r}
#| label: chunk-out
1 + 1
```

## Code chunk figure

```{r}
#| label: chunk-fig
#| fig-cap: "A plot"
plot(1:10)
```

## Positioned image (re-activatable)

![](../image.png){.absolute left=100px top=150px width=200px height=120px}

## Positioned div (re-activatable)

::: {.absolute left=200px top=150px width=300px height=120px}
Already-positioned editable div.
:::

## Positioned arrow (re-activatable)

{{< arrow from="100,100" to="400,300" >}}

## Mixed slide

A paragraph.

- list item one
- list item two

> a quote

```python
y = 2
```

![](../image.png)
